analogy: overclaimed exactness : actual proof ≅ DPI bound : exact under injectivity
transition: M₀(claims exact) → M₁(claims bound + conditions for exactness)
frame: careful reader: which claims need which assumptions?

analogy: theory-level notation : algorithm-level ≅ per-instance param : global approx
transition: M₀(mixes L1 and L2) → M₁(splits into L1 paragraph + L2 paragraph)

analogy: abstract gradient target : body proof ≅ V_soft : F(θ) joint free energy
frame: notation police: grep all occurrences, unify

analogy: theorem without frozen-param caveat : correct ≅ missing for-fixed-θ
transition: M₀(theorem seems general) → M₁(theorem explicitly states frozen θ)

analogy: heuristic derivation : quasi-proof tone ≅ drives : heuristically tends
frame: honest author: say suggests not proves when you cannot prove
